title: Warm Islands
body:
_Want to play some minecraft but with tropical islands~~~~?_

This mod generates warm islands and ocean - nothing else. 

Important: **generate.warm_island** in the world type tab (where you can also choose between large_biomes/superflat/...), otherwise it will not work!

There are:
- small islands (often in groups)
- bigger islands
- the vast ocean :D
- structures: Pillager outposts, villages, ruren portals and jungle temples

Feel free to use this in a (pirate) modpack, but give credit!
